description: Workspace profile plus OpenClaw config fragments and doctor checks.
post_install_notes: Inspect fragments under `.solo-mise/openclaw/` before merging into ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json.
Run `solo-mise doctor --target <workspace> --harness openclaw` to confirm wiring.
Never let `openclaw doctor --fix` (the OpenClaw tool, not solo-mise) rewrite provider prefixes blindly.
